message: Hi baby. Welcome to the third day of loving of you more. So for me, these are not just simple messages. Its my whole heart that I present you. I want you to know that no matter what I am there for you in every if and but. I know u will never tell me many things, that u expect, I mean everyone expects to be made feel very special. But u want it more naturally. I hopw im trying my best. Because for me ur not just a boyfriend but my bestest friend , my go to person ,my therapist, my safe space , my aaltu-faltu talks person, in short U are my whole world , globe , universe. I never knew I would fall for you this much but Ya I did. And I'm glad and greatfull to have uh in my life......Crushing over you 3% more my luv...I LOVE YOU every now and then
